requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic compatibility — Household refrigerating appliances entering Ghana (GSA conformity assessment + GS/IEC CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——进入加纳的家用制冷器具（GSA合格评定 + GS/IEC CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——進入迦納的家用製冷器具（GSA合格評定 + GS/IEC CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Ghana does not operate a standalone, EU-style EMC Directive. EMC characteristics of household appliances are addressed through Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) standards, which generally adopt the IEC/CISPR framework (Ghana adopts IEC standards as GS standards). The applicable emission standard family is the GS adoption of CISPR 14-1 (electromagnetic disturbance — household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) and immunity per CISPR 14-2. EMC verification for refrigerators is handled within GSA's mandatory conformity assessment programme for regulated/high-volume consumer products, typically via a Certificate of Conformity issued against test reports and destination/pre-shipment inspection at the ports of Tema or Takoradi, rather than via a self-declaration regime. There is no Ghana-specific EMC mark separate from the overall GSA conformity decision; EMC is one element of the product safety and quality assessment. Where a refrigerator contains a radio/wireless module, radio-spectrum EMC aspects also fall to the National Communications Authority （NCA） type-approval.
summary.zh: 加纳不实行独立的欧盟式电磁兼容指令。家用器具的电磁兼容特性通过加纳标准局（GSA）标准处理，这些标准通常采用IEC/CISPR框架（加纳将IEC标准转化为GS标准）。适用的发射标准族为GS转化的CISPR 14-1（电磁骚扰——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具——第1部分：发射），抗扰度依据CISPR 14-2。冰箱的电磁兼容核验在GSA对受监管/大批量消费品的强制合格评定方案内处理，通常通过依据检测报告签发的合格证书以及在特马（Tema）或塔科拉迪（Takoradi）港口的到岸/装运前检验完成，而非自我声明制度。加纳没有独立于GSA整体合格评定决定之外的电磁兼容标志；电磁兼容是产品安全与质量评定的一个要素。若冰箱含无线模块，无线频谱电磁兼容方面还须接受国家通信管理局（NCA）型号核准。
summary.zht: 迦納不實行獨立的歐盟式電磁相容指令。家用器具的電磁相容特性通過迦納標準局（GSA）標準處理，這些標準通常採用IEC/CISPR框架（迦納將IEC標準轉化為GS標準）。適用的發射標準族為GS轉化的CISPR 14-1（電磁騷擾——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具——第1部分：發射），抗擾度依據CISPR 14-2。冰箱的電磁相容核驗在GSA對受監管/大批量消費品的強制合格評定方案內處理，通常通過依據檢測報告簽發的合格證書以及在特馬（Tema）或塔科拉迪（Takoradi）港口的到岸/裝運前檢驗完成，而非自我聲明制度。迦納沒有獨立於GSA整體合格評定決定之外的電磁相容標誌；電磁相容是產品安全與質量評定的一個要素。若冰箱含無線模組，無線頻譜電磁相容方面還須接受國家通信管理局（NCA）型號核准。

standards_or_laws: Ghana Standards Authority Act, 2022 (Act 1078) — basis for GSA standards adoption and mandatory conformity assessment
GS adoption of CISPR 14-1 (IEC) — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
GS adoption of CISPR 14-2 (IEC) — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard
GSA Conformity Assessment Programme / G-Mark and destination inspection (Tema, Takoradi)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 applies. These are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China （GB 4343.1） and Ghana （GS/CISPR 14-1） descend from the same CISPR 14-1 base, the underlying technical limits are closely aligned; the practical difference is the conformity-assessment route, not the disturbance limits.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）。谐波发射方面适用GB 17625.1-2022。上述标准在市场监管总局/认监委（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国（GB 4343.1）与加纳（GS/CISPR 14-1）同源于CISPR 14-1，底层技术限值高度一致；实际差异在于合格评定路径，而非骚扰限值本身。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）。諧波發射方面適用GB 17625.1-2022。上述標準在市場監管總局/認監委（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國（GB 4343.1）與迦納（GS/CISPR 14-1）同源於CISPR 14-1，底層技術限值高度一致；實際差異在於合格評定路徑，而非騷擾限值本身。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both regimes adopt CISPR 14-1, the EMC emission limits a Chinese refrigerator already meets under GB 4343.1-2018 are technically close to what Ghana's GS/CISPR 14-1 standard requires. The gap is procedural rather than technical: (1) Conformity route — Ghana does not accept a manufacturer self-declaration in lieu of GSA's conformity assessment; a GSA Certificate of Conformity and/or destination inspection is required, and CCC certificates are not automatically recognised. (2) Test-report acceptance — GSA accepts IEC/CISPR-format test reports (often via accepted international labs), but the report must reference the GS/CISPR designation and be presented through the conformity-assessment programme with the in-country importer. (3) Radio modules — a smart/Wi-Fi refrigerator additionally requires NCA type-approval, which a China-market unit will not hold.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度都采用CISPR 14-1，中国冰箱在GB 4343.1-2018下已满足的电磁发射限值，与加纳GS/CISPR 14-1要求在技术上接近。差距在于程序而非技术：（1）合格评定路径——加纳不接受以制造商自我声明替代GSA合格评定；须取得GSA合格证书及/或到岸检验，CCC证书不被自动承认。（2）检测报告接受——GSA接受IEC/CISPR格式检测报告（常通过被认可的国际实验室），但报告须引用GS/CISPR编号并通过合格评定方案、由在加纳的进口商提交。（3）无线模块——智能/Wi-Fi冰箱另须NCA型号核准，面向中国市场的产品不会持有此核准。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度都採用CISPR 14-1，中國冰箱在GB 4343.1-2018下已滿足的電磁發射限值，與迦納GS/CISPR 14-1要求在技術上接近。差距在於程序而非技術：（1）合格評定路徑——迦納不接受以製造商自我聲明替代GSA合格評定；須取得GSA合格證書及/或到岸檢驗，CCC證書不被自動承認。（2）檢測報告接受——GSA接受IEC/CISPR格式檢測報告（常通過被認可的國際實驗室），但報告須引用GS/CISPR編號並通過合格評定方案、由在迦納的進口商提交。（3）無線模組——智能/Wi-Fi冰箱另須NCA型號核准，面向中國市場的產品不會持有此核准。

mandatory_status.target: EMC assessed within GSA's mandatory conformity assessment for regulated consumer appliances (GS adoption of CISPR 14-1/14-2). No standalone EU-style EMC Directive; no separate EMC mark. NCA type-approval mandatory only for embedded radio modules.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana has no separate EMC Directive; refrigerator EMC is covered by GSA's adoption of CISPR 14-1/14-2 within mandatory conformity assessment. Because China's GB 4343.1 and Ghana's GS standard share the CISPR 14-1 base, emission limits are closely aligned, but a Chinese CCC certificate is not auto-recognised — a GSA Certificate of Conformity and/or destination inspection (Tema/Takoradi) via a registered importer is required. Smart/Wi-Fi models additionally need NCA type-approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳没有独立的电磁兼容指令；冰箱电磁兼容通过GSA对CISPR 14-1/14-2的转化、在强制合格评定内涵盖。由于中国GB 4343.1与加纳GS标准同源于CISPR 14-1，发射限值高度一致，但中国CCC证书不被自动承认——须经注册进口商取得GSA合格证书及/或到岸检验（特马/塔科拉迪）。智能/Wi-Fi型号另须NCA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納沒有獨立的電磁相容指令；冰箱電磁相容通過GSA對CISPR 14-1/14-2的轉化、在強制合格評定內涵蓋。由於中國GB 4343.1與迦納GS標準同源於CISPR 14-1，發射限值高度一致，但中國CCC證書不被自動承認——須經註冊進口商取得GSA合格證書及/或到岸檢驗（特馬/塔科拉迪）。智能/Wi-Fi型號另須NCA型號核准。
